live_card_behavior_summary: Dashboard/UI and runtime surfaces showed a true live game card during a clean zero-position paper state, but no progression delta occurred inside the sampled observation window.
truth_source_summary: No shadow/debug override of main live truth was proven; stream/state/game surfaces remained coherent and the stream endpoint stayed live.
position_math_summary: Not provable in this task window because no new paper trade opened and scope did not allow forcing one.
mismatch: No hard contradiction found, but live progression-over-time and live-position math under a fresh open trade were not observable.
